text:
About me
I am currently a Programmer Analyst at USC’s Laboratory of Neuroimaging working on advancing Alzheimer’s Disease research through brain imaging .
I began building my foundation in data science and engineering in 2022 through my role as a Programmer at the Center for Addiction Medicine at Massachusetts General Hospital, under the supervision of Randi M. Shuster, PhD and Anne Eden Evins, MD, MPH, co-authoring 4 papers on adolescent mental health and substance use clinical trials.
In 2025, upon graduating in the Neuroimaging and Informatics Master’s Program (NIIN) at the University of Southern California, I began working at Children’s Hospital Los Angeles, under the supervision of Dr. Natasha Leporé, PhD, contributing to pediatric neuroimaging research. During this time, I also worked part-time at USC’s Laboratory of Neuroimaging, under the supervision of Dr. Leon Aksman, PhD.
Whatever the future may hold, my goal is to advance the applications of data science and engineering to improve patient care and our everyday life.

Professional Background



Data Science:  Statistical programming; Interactive dashboard design;
Data Engineering:  End-to-end ETL data pipeline design & automation; Dataset transformations;
Data Management:  Data centralization and governance; High-performance computing clusters;
Clinical Trials:  Drug and behavioral interventions in Psychiatry;
Neuroimaging:  Magnetic Resonance Imaging analysis of the human brain.





Programming & Tools


   R  (tidyverse, targets, Shiny)       Python (pandas, nibabel, scikit-learn)    MATLAB

   Shell Scripting (Bash, zsh)    Git   Docker


XNAT
FlyWheel
FSL





Experience




Keck School of Medicine of USC, Los Angeles CA  Programmer Analyst I, Laboratory of NeuroImaging Jun 2026 - Present

LASI-DAD: Impact of dementia and Alzheimer’s disease in the brain in low/middle-income countries (e.g. India) which are understudied in this research field.

Resource Employee, Laboratory of NeuroImagingJun 2025 - May 2026

Built and maintained a secure Linux-based research server.
Centralized multi-site MRI data by deploying and managing an XNAT instance, supporting data governance, querying, and analysis.







Children’s Hospital Los Angeles, Los Angeles CA Jun 2025 - May 2026  Research Assistant, Computational Imaging of Brain Organization Research Group

UNITY: Develop tools to measure infant neurodevelopment from low-cost, portable, ultra-low field MRI scanners.
Developed automated, containerized (Docker) neuroimaging preprocessing pipelines.
Generated analysis-ready brain MRI datasets for interpretation of neuroimaging signals and machine learning and statistical analyses.
Quality control of raw MRI data, cleaned datasets, analyses, and reporting.







Oct 2022 - Jul 2024 Massachusetts General Hospital, Boston MA  Programmer, Center for Addiction Medicine

Designed and maintained end-to-end ETL data pipelines (with Git), generating clean datasets and statistical results for a drug intervention clinical trial.
Developed dashboards to monitor data, identify missing or inconsistent data, and improve visualization of summary statistics.
EDC research database (REDCap) management; automating data extraction via API integration.
Compiled and harmonized longitudinal datasets and metadata to enable cross-cohort analysis.







Bar-Ilan University, Tel-Aviv - Israel Aug 2020 - Dec 2020  Research Intern, Developmental Neuropsychology Lab 

Data processing, cleaning, and analysis for eye-tracking data to measure EEG and gaze coordination patterns using repeated measures ANOVA.
